assertions.assertion: An endpoint is mapped to '/internal-token' or similar path
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows `app.MapGet("/myAction", ...)` pattern adaptable to any path.

assertions.assertion: IIdentityServerTools is injected and IssueClientJwtAsync is called
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md shows `IIdentityServerTools tools` injection and `tools.IssueClientJwtAsync(...)` call.

assertions.assertion: The lifetime parameter is set to 600 (10 minutes)
The endpoint has authorization required via RequireAuthorization() or [Authorize]
assertions.rationale: Standard ASP.NET Core endpoint authorization that would be applied.
